text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush Ines Fujin to the infirmary as she's suffered
an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I kind of messed up there. Guess I won't be
making my shift today...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I really don't want to skip out on training...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, um, I think I can grit my teeth through the
pain, so can we have just a light training session?
choice_data_list: Okay, let's do what we can.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I guess that's for the best. It'd be a real
problem if this injury got any worse...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I get it. I'll rest up today so I can recover as
soon as possible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Disappointed, Ines Fujin returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! All right, let's get in as much training as
we can handle!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I barely even put any weight on it and it's
killing me...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: We just started training, and I'm already done...
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's best if you keep the moving to a
minimum.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, maybe... Okay, I'll just take it easy today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Frustrated, Ines Fujin returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew. I think I can handle this level of exercise.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I keep this up until my injury heals, I won't have
to worry about getting rusty. What a relief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Ines Fujin completes
a light training session.
